functions.title: Guide Book #42
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #42§r
§lForest Wisp§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Wisp, Spirit, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Pale Garden, Taiga, Jungle, Swamp,

Mangrove Swamp, Cherry Grove, Mossy Forest, Overgrown Jungle.
•§lHealth§r: 12
•§lFly speed§r: 0.1
•§lImmune to§r: Physical Damage, Fire.
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Enchanted Dust, XP Orbs.
•Can be magical

charged.
•Charged Forest Wisp can produce a §lBottle o'Enchanting§r, when interacted with using a §lGlass Bottle§r.
•Uncharged Forest Wisp will become charged again after 5 minutes.
•Can be captured by using a Empty Jar.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Glowing with ancient magic, the Forest Wisp drifts silently through the underbrush and tree canopies, leaving behind faint trails of light and energy.
